FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: PBOC's USD/CNY hike signals CNY weakening, supporting USD/JPY
Australia's trade deficit reinforces risk-off USD demand
FX.excerpt: AI flags USD/JPY for upside as CNY weakness and risk aversion align. Key support at MA20 offers tactical entry with tight risk.
FX.comment: PBOC's CNY weakening and Australia's trade deficit create a bullish USD/JPY setup with MA20 support.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: AI Momentum and Iran-Deal Optimism Drive Breakout Above Key Resistance
tldr_points: S&P 500 surges on Iran-deal hopes and AI sector leadership
Nvidia and ARM earnings momentum drive tech sector breadth
Technical setup favors buying dips toward MA20 with defined risk
STOCKS.excerpt: AI-driven rally and geopolitical tailwinds push index toward record highs; tactical long bias warranted
STOCKS.comment: Uptrend intact with AI earnings momentum and geopolitical tailwinds supporting further upside; buy dips toward MA20

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: White House targets July 4 crypto bill passage
1inch exploit drains $6M but Aave liquidations contained
Institutional mining losses offset by record production
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC positioned for recovery as regulatory clarity emerges and technicals signal oversold rebound.
CRYPTO.comment: Regulatory clarity and technical oversold condition support upward momentum.
